emails.subject: Laurie Knight
emails.body: Laurie Knight Let's discuss Laurie and package. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: Laurie Knight
emails.body: RE: Laurie Knight Thanks for considering taking care of Laurie as well. I'll let you know how my meeting goes tommorrow at Hahn Loeser. I meet with them beginning at 10:30. Haven't heard from Joanne Hill yet. To: Migden, Janine

emails.subject: RE: Laurie Knight
emails.body: It may be tommorrow with Joann. To: Shapiro, Richard
